chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-1050 of 2018. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 21.06.2018. Mr. Muhammad Zaman Zaur, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman Jamali, AAG alongwith ASI Ali Akbar of PS: Khanot. = Mr. Amjad Hussain Tajpar Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.5 and 6; whereas learned AAG files statement on behalf of respondent No.2, taken on record. Copy of the statement supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. It is stated by the learned AAG and the learned counsel for respondents No.5 and 6 that there is dispute over a plot between the petitioner and the aforesaid private respondents and no harassment has been done by them to the petitioner; even then, they undertake that they will act in accordance with law and would not harass the petitioner in any manner. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the aforementioned statements made by the learned AAG as well as the learned counsel for respondents No.5 and 6, seeks disposal of the instant petition in terms thereof. The instant petition is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE S
